name: Prologis, Inc.
description: Prologis, Inc. is the global leader in logistics real estate with a focus on high-barrier, high-growth markets. The company owns, manages, and develops high-quality logistics facilities across four continents, serving a diverse customer base in the business-to-business and retail/online fulfillment sectors. As a real estate investment trust (REIT), Prologis provides essential infrastructure for the global supply chain, leveraging its scale and expertise to deliver sustainable and innovative warehouse solutions that meet the evolving needs of modern commerce and global trade.

investment_theses.company_type: Industrial Real Estate / Logistics & Warehousing in US
